subject: Re:
body:
don't worry

--- Fabi! <fabiehle@yahoo.com.br> wrote:

> Hy Jeffrey...
>    
>   I'm sorry if I desapointed you...I  swear it
> wasn't my intention...
>   I don't know. I think that I was a litlle afraid,
> or concern...that you some day would not like me
> anymore and send me home. 
>   Don't misjudge me whit what I'm about to say....  
>   I don't know if you remember one day when Jean
> Luck came to Brazil and you asked him to talk with
> me about a job...I was trying to be model at that
> time. That nigth he said to me that he didn't know
> how you still liking me. That you always stay with a
> girl for a short time then you send her home. An
> that he was sure that you would "get sick" of me
> soon or later. So I began to think about that. It
> wasn't impossible not to think, even knowing that he
> could be just scaring me.
>    In that time I met my boyfriend, and I was liking
> him, and I really belived that I would able to
> study, whit my work. But I also mised you ( and
> don't you think that it's about the money... if was
> like this, I would have gone when you asked me. I
> really liked you, and you know that, I think ). 
>   Today I think a lot about this, mainly because you
> don't talk to me anymore. I thougth at least we
> could be friends. 
>   I've made a joyce in that time...I don't know if
> was the rigth or wrong, I am happy. But I don't have
> regrets, just thougths about how it would be if I
> had took other decision.
>   I don't know if you anderstood me, hope so. What I
> am trying to say is that I am really sorry if I let
> you down, and that I want you anderstand my reasons.
>   I hope that you'll let me see you some day
> again... I just want to say thank you and give you a
> hug.
>   Please, say something.
> 
> 		
> ---------------------------------

> alertas de e-mail no celular e anti-spam realmente
> eficaz.

body_html:
don't worry

--- Fabi! fabiehle@yahoo.com.br wrote:

Hy Jeffrey...

I'm sorry if I desapointed you...I swear it
wasn't my intention...
I don't know. I think that I was a litlle afraid,
or concern...that you some day would not like me
anymore and send me home.
Don't misjudge me whit what I'm about to say....
I don't know if you remember one day when Jean
Luck came to Brazil and you asked him to talk with
me about a job...I was trying to be model at that
time. That nigth he said to me that he didn't know
how you still liking me. That you always stay with a
girl for a short time then you send her home. An
that he was sure that you would "get sick" of me
soon or later. So I began to think about that. It
wasn't impossible not to think, even knowing that he
could be just scaring me.
In that time I met my boyfriend, and I was liking
him, and I really belived that I would able to
study, whit my work. But I also mised you ( and
don't you think that it's about the money... if was
like this, I would have gone when you asked me. I
really liked you, and you know that, I think ).
Today I think a lot about this, mainly because you
don't talk to me anymore. I thougth at least we
could be friends.
I've made a joyce in that time...I don't know if
was the rigth or wrong, I am happy. But I don't have
regrets, just thougths about how it would be if I
had took other decision.
I don't know if you anderstood me, hope so. What I
am trying to say is that I am really sorry if I let
you down, and that I want you anderstand my reasons.
I hope that you'll let me see you some day
again... I just want to say thank you and give you a
hug.
Please, say something.
